subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! I have read thy letter with its wonderful themes and eloquent meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المهتدی بنور الهدی انی قرئت نمیقتک البدیعه المضامین البلیغه المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @love of God
